provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Boreholes Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: a well sunk by means of a rig or machinery, and shall not include a well sunk by persons subject to any Botswana customary law, with hand labour only, in any of the tribal territories defined in the Tribal Territories Act (Cap. 32:03) or on any of the Barolong Farms
